$schema-comment: Allow-list for scripts/check-edge-functions-deployed.mjs --all (Task #68, Phase 4). Source: Task #61 audit + Task #66 Phase 2 disposition + Task #65 Phase 1 RESOLVED list. Edit sparingly — every override is a documented exception, not a workaround.

nonSourceCallers._comment: Functions that legitimately have zero source callers. Each entry must name HOW it is invoked. Anything deployed but absent from this map AND with zero source callers is flagged as a true orphan.

admin-check-access.reason: Invoked by other admin-* functions to short-circuit unauthorized callers (DevKit gate).

ask-portfolio.reason: Called by /p/:slug portfolio chat widget (computed URL, not a source-string match).

auth-email-hook.reason: Supabase Auth Hook (HMAC-signed) — Supabase posts to a fixed URL.

create-portfolio-session.reason: Called by public portfolio page-load analytics opener.

export-portfolio-pdf.reason: Mobile downloads (via mobile-api router) + portfolio share links.

generate-question-bank.reason: Interview prep sheet (caller scan missed dynamic invocation name).

hard-purge.reason: Admin GDPR purge — invoked manually from Supabase dashboard / DevKit.

kinde-webhook.reason: Kinde user.created webhook (HMAC-signed) — Kinde posts to a fixed URL.

og-image.reason: Dynamic OpenGraph image for portfolio link previews (server-rendered <meta> tag).

parse-resume.reason: Resume upload parser (caller scan missed dynamic invocation name).

revenuecat-webhook.reason: RevenueCat entitlement webhook (shared-secret in Authorization header).

send-push.reason: Server-to-server Expo push fan-out (EDGE_INTERNAL_TOKEN in x-internal-token header).

validate-api-key.reason: User-facing API key validator (caller scan missed dynamic invocation name — called from src/integrations/supabase/edgeFunctions.ts via computed function slug).

manage-api-keys.reason: BYOK removed (Task #17/19). Returns 410 Gone unconditionally. No source callers remain after BYOK cleanup.

analyze-resume.reason: Task #41 retirement tombstone — returns 410 Gone unconditionally. Source kept for rollback; NOT intentionally callable.

optimize-for-linkedin.reason: Task #41 retirement tombstone — returns 410 Gone unconditionally. Traffic now via editor-ai x-editor-ai-action: optimize-for-linkedin.

recruiter-simulation.reason: Task #41 retirement tombstone — returns 410 Gone unconditionally. Traffic now via editor-ai x-editor-ai-action: recruiter-sim.

suggest-template.reason: Task #41 retirement tombstone — returns 410 Gone unconditionally. Traffic now via editor-ai x-editor-ai-action: suggest-template.

noAuthExpectedStatus._comment: HTTP status expected when called with no Authorization header at all. Default is 401 (Phase 1 contract — gateway should reject before the handler runs). Per-function overrides cover (a) functions that are intentionally public and reject on body validation (400), (b) genuinely anonymous endpoints (200), and (c) retired tombstone stubs (410). New 500/503 responses indicate real auth-handler drift and are flagged.

_overrideRationale.manage-api-keys: Retired tombstone stub (BYOK removed Task #17/19). Returns 410 Gone unconditionally for all requests — no auth check runs.
_overrideRationale.analyze-resume: Retired tombstone stub (Task #41). Returns 410 Gone unconditionally before any auth check. Source kept for rollback.
_overrideRationale.optimize-for-linkedin: Retired tombstone stub (Task #41). Returns 410 Gone unconditionally. Traffic now via editor-ai.
_overrideRationale.recruiter-simulation: Retired tombstone stub (Task #41). Returns 410 Gone unconditionally. Traffic now via editor-ai.
_overrideRationale.suggest-template: Retired tombstone stub (Task #41). Returns 410 Gone unconditionally. Traffic now via editor-ai.
_overrideRationale.admin-devkit-data: Action-dispatch router: validates required `action` field before invoking requireAdminAuth, so a no-auth POST {} returns 400 ('action is required: ...') rather than 401. Same body-first contract as admin-email and verify-dev-kit.
_overrideRationale.admin-email: Same body-first action dispatch as admin-devkit-data — validates required `action` field before auth.
_overrideRationale.verify-dev-kit: Validates required email + password fields before attempting credential check — a no-auth POST {} returns 400 with the missing-field error before the auth comparator runs.
_overrideRationale.verify-email: Action-dispatch: validates required `action` field before any auth check — a no-auth POST {} returns 400 'Unknown action' because the body is empty. Auth runs only after action is validated.
_overrideRationale.detect-and-humanize: Returns 401 {error:'Missing authorization header'} correctly. Explicitly listed to document confirmed posture after Task #10 probe (2026-06-04).
_overrideRationale.editor-ai: Returns 401 {code:'UNAUTHORIZED_NO_AUTH_HEADER'} correctly. Explicitly listed to document confirmed posture after Task #10 probe (2026-06-04).
_overrideRationale.export-portfolio-pdf: Returns 401 {code:'UNAUTHORIZED_NO_AUTH_HEADER'} correctly. Explicitly listed to document confirmed posture after Task #10 probe (2026-06-04).

knownPreExistingDrift._comment: Auth-posture drifts that are already tracked under separate fix tasks. The drift checker reports these as warnings (not blocking failures) until the named task lands. When the named task closes, delete the entry and let the next CI run confirm parity.

_freshnessBlockingNote: Set to false because Supabase Management API updated_at is a metadata-write timestamp, NOT a deploy-event timestamp — it does not advance on `supabase functions deploy` (verified Task #66, 2026-05-03: redeploys bumped version 264→269 with no updated_at movement). All 73 functions were redeployed on 2026-05-05 via deploy-functions.sh (all returned OK). Freshness errors from check-edge-functions-deployed.mjs are therefore always false positives for this project. When set to false, the checker emits WARNING instead of ERROR and does not set exit code 1 for stale timestamps. To enforce strict freshness (e.g. in a post-deploy CI gate that writes a local timestamp file), flip this back to true and override EDGE_STALE_TOLERANCE_HOURS accordingly.
